input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.2.1
            TITLE: the floor or bottom must be made from one of the three:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.2.1: The Floor or Bottom must be made from one of the three:
F.10.2.1 The Floor or Bottom must be made from one of the three: 
a. Steel   1.25 mm minimum thickness 
b. Aluminum  3.2 mm minimum thickness 
c. Equivalent Alternate / Composite materials ( F.4.1,  F.4.3 )

final_answer: rule F.10.2.1: The Floor or Bottom must be made from one of the three: F.10.2.1 The Floor or Bottom must be made from one of the three: a. Steel 1.25 mm minimum thickness b. Aluminum 3.2 mm minimum thickness c. Equivalent Alternate / Composite materials ( F.4.1, F.4.3 )
